message:
feat(events): Add UserVarPayload and event_id to PatternDetected

Extend the event system to support shell hook integration and workflow
event tracking.

UserVarPayload for shell hooks:
- New UserVarPayload type for decoding user-var events from shell hooks.
  WezTerm allows OSC 1337 user variables that shell integrations use to
  signal command start/end events.
- decode() method handles base64-encoded JSON payloads with lenient mode
  for graceful degradation on parse failures.
- UserVarError enum for structured error handling: WatcherNotRunning,
  IpcSendFailed, ParseFailed.

Event enum changes:
- Add UserVarReceived event variant for receiving shell hook events via
  IPC, with pane_id, variable name, and decoded payload.
- Add optional event_id field to PatternDetected for workflow tracking.
  This enables workflows to mark events as handled after processing.

Update event_kind(), pane_id(), and EventBus routing for new variant.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
